fields.label: Code
fields.description: Short uppercase code, e.g. AXIS, MARESCO_NIGHT, SOFA

fields.label: Requires Linear Metre (LM)
fields.description: When checked the formula can use ADD_INSTALL_FROM_LM steps. The UI will ask for an LM dimension when previewing.

fields.label: Pricing Mechanism
fields.description: Supplier Ladder: shown in the Sales Document price picker. Configurator BOM: used internally by the product configurators (Night Collection, Lorella, etc.) — hidden from the sales picker.

fields.label: Max Discount % (floor for sales)
fields.description: Maximum % discount sales staff may offer. The floor price = RRP Inc. VAT × (1 - this%). Offers below the floor trigger a warning.

fields.label: Gozo Delivery Surcharge (€)
fields.description: Extra fixed cost added to the weighted distribution total when Gozo delivery is selected in the Night Collection configurator.

fields.label: Formula Steps
fields.description: Steps are applied sequentially to the base cost price to arrive at the selling price.
